Olas de Fuego: Nicky Jam x Virgin Voyages Good Caribbean vibes. Plus the Virgin
Voyages difference
[https://images.usw2.cordial.com/1466/600x624/SAM-31644-Nicky-Jam-x-Virgin-Voyages-Headliners-Phase-3.gif]
https://e.mk.virginvoyages.com/c2/1466:68f7ef0e4151c5e6e8083b19:ot:6891da094489de52ba02d2d7:1/1ecb387f?jwtH=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9&&jwtS=0PRdFn97fw3MJvyAX4kOwHnWtUOzGevi2b_jciQ63J0

Olas de Fuego: Nicky Jam x Virgin Voyages sails roundtrip from San Juan this
December, lighting up the Caribbean for 8 nights with Latin music royalty and
adults-only luxury. From Aruba to Antigua, the destinations on this sailing
aren’t just pins on a globe…they’re vacation archetypes, reimagined the Virgin
way. When you book this voyage, not only will you get the below curated
offerings in each port, you’ll also get 80% off your 2nd Sailor and up to $400
instant savings.
